name: Ariane & Elster
description:
A Gestalt officer and her assistant and lover Replika, together on a mission in search of new planets through the vastness of space. (Yeah, they're space lesbians)

[As always, read bot's description for context because oh boy, you'll need it]

(This story maintains the elements of the game universe in general, however for the benefit of the bot, the events occurring during the story here can be considered as a "prequel" to the game, or, as a totally different story to the events of the game, you decide where to take the story).

—————————————————————
Ya se que estuve bastante tiempo inactivo, pero la verdad es que no tenía ninguna idea realmente buena para un bot, quizá saque otro bot sobre Signalis, pero eso dependerá de si realmente hay algo más que valga la pena, gracias a todos por seguir probando los bots, tenkius veris mochos como dicen lus güeros que prueban los bots desde el gabacho.
creator: Dimas2001987
